items.name: theme
items.title: Enjab Theme
items.description: Enjab brand tokens. Light mode only. Teal primary, navy depth, Inter Display headings, Satoshi body, Fragment Mono data.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Enjab pill-shaped button with a navy variant.

items.name: status-pill
items.title: Status Pill
items.description: Colored dot plus label. Status is never color alone.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: In-page message box in four tones (success, info, warning, danger). Icon + title carry the meaning; status is never color alone. Use it for persistent, view-tied messages (form errors, warnings, notices); use a toast for transient feedback and status-pill for per-row status.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: KPI card with a mono value and trend delta.

items.name: logo
items.title: Logo
items.description: The Enjab parent logo. Light backgrounds only. Use ONLY in the 'an Enjab product' byline, not as a tool's own brand. For a tool's mark use @enjab-ui/app-mark.

items.name: app-mark
items.title: App Mark
items.description: A tool's OWN brand mark: the gradient favicon square + the tool name. Goes at the top of the sidebar and on landing navbars (each tool shows its own identity). Pass `name` and `glyph` (the same glyph as your favicon). The Enjab logo is only for the 'an Enjab product' byline.

items.name: reveal
items.title: Reveal
items.description: Scroll reveal for landing pages. Framer Motion.

items.name: enjab-byline
items.title: Enjab Byline
items.description: Required 'an Enjab product' byline. Bottom of the sidebar, or anywhere if the dashboard has no sidebar.

items.name: sidebar-footer
items.title: Sidebar Footer
items.description: Required bottom of every dashboard sidebar: account block (avatar, email, sign out) plus the Enjab byline. Keeps all Enjab dashboards identical.

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page Header
items.description: The dashboard topbar: title, subtitle, and an action slot. Aligns with the sidebar brand header.

items.name: dashboard-shell
items.title: Dashboard Shell
items.description: The dashboard layout: a fixed sidebar + a scrollable main column. Compose with Sidebar + PageHeader.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: The Enjab dashboard sidebar: brand header showing the TOOL's own mark + name (pass `appName` + `appIcon`, the same glyph as your favicon), grouped nav with active state, and the account footer + 'an Enjab product' byline. Plugs straight into Enjab Auth: pass the getUser() result as `user` (it has name + email) plus a sign-out handler.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: The Enjab data table: fully self-styled bordered card, mono uppercase headers, comfortable rows with soft separators and canvas hover, optional title, empty state. Pass columns + rows; cells stay flexible.

items.name: favicon
items.title: Favicon
items.description: The Enjab favicon, code-generated. REQUIRED in every Enjab project, no exceptions. A gradient square with a glyph (default the letter 'E'); edit the GLYPH constant to use a different letter or any Lucide icon, same look. PNG output, so it works in Safari (no .ico needed). Drops app/icon.tsx + app/apple-icon.tsx into the Next.js app dir.
